Found your policy! Vehicle: Honda Civic 2023. I'll quote the best options for you.

Done! 3 options:

1. Basic: $185/mo
2. Full: $247/mo
3. Premium: $312/mo

Option 2 covers theft, collision and third-party. Which do you prefer?

No lines of code. No programmer.
Just a conversation with AI.

steps.label: Described
steps.title: "I want insurance service via WhatsApp"
steps.description: The user described in one sentence what they needed: a complete insurance service and sales system that identifies leads, collects data and offers products.
steps.highlight: One sentence. No code. No technical specification.

steps.label: AI Planned
steps.title: 4-phase plan generated in seconds
steps.description: AI analyzed the request and created a structured plan: prepare specialized agents, build the workflow, implement sales flow and activate WhatsApp integration.
steps.highlight: The user just needed to say "Approved."

steps.label: Executed
steps.title: 3 agents + 1 workflow created automatically
steps.description: AI executed the steps: created 3 specialized AI agents (Identifier, Collector, Seller), selected tools and built the complete workflow with 4 actions.
steps.highlight: The user gave feedback and AI adjusted on the spot.

steps.label: Running
steps.title: Real WhatsApp service in 13 seconds
steps.description: Workflow running: customer sends "Good afternoon" and AI identifies the lead, collects data, offers home and phone insurance — all automatic.
steps.highlight: From sentence to working service: less than 3 minutes.

videoSection.description: See in a few minutes how an insurance service system was created from scratch using only AI chat.

faq.heading: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Catalisa.

items.question: What is Catalisa?
items.answer: Catalisa is a composable WhatsApp automation platform with AI. It combines 60+ building blocks, a visual studio with generative AI, and intelligent agents to automate customer service, sales, and operations via WhatsApp — no code required.

items.question: Do I need to know how to code?
items.answer: No. Catalisa was designed to be used without code. You describe what you need in natural language and the Studio creates the specification and workflow automatically. For advanced integrations, we offer API and SDK.

items.question: What's the difference between Cloud API and QR Code?
items.answer: Cloud API is Meta's official connection, ideal for companies that need compliance, unlimited scale, and auditability. QR Code (Baileys) is instant and free, ideal for testing, POCs, and small operations. You can use both on the same platform.

items.question: Is Catalisa an official Meta partner?
items.answer: Yes. Catalisa uses Meta's official WhatsApp Business API (Cloud API), ensuring compliance and access to all official platform features.

items.question: How does billing work?
items.answer: Catalisa offers flexible plans based on usage volume. Contact our team for a personalized proposal according to your needs.

items.question: Can I try before committing?
items.answer: Yes. We offer a complete demonstration where you can see the platform working with your real use case. Schedule a demo with our team.

items.question: How long does setup take?
items.answer: Initial setup takes minutes. With QR Code you connect instantly. With Cloud API, Meta's approval process takes 3 to 5 business days. Creating workflows and AI agents is done in minutes through the Studio.

items.question: How many simultaneous conversations does it support?
items.answer: There's no fixed limit. With Cloud API, scale is unlimited. The platform was designed to support from 1 to thousands of simultaneous conversations, with AI agents operating 24/7.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. Catalisa uses end-to-end encryption, multi-tenant isolation, access control (RBAC), automatic sensitive data masking, and cloud infrastructure in Brazil with automatic backups.

items.question: Is Catalisa LGPD compliant?
items.answer: Yes. The platform was designed from the ground up with privacy by design. All data operations follow Brazil's General Data Protection Law (LGPD), including consent, anonymization, and data subject rights.

items.question: Can I integrate with my current CRM/ERP?
items.answer: Yes. Catalisa offers integration building blocks for major CRMs and ERPs, plus webhooks and REST API for custom integrations.

items.question: What are building blocks?
items.answer: Building blocks are ready-made, composable components you combine to create automations. There are 60+ blocks across 10 domains: AI, fintech, CRM, security, communication, integration, and more. Each block is tested and production-ready.

items.question: How do AI agents work?
items.answer: Each AI agent has its own personality, tools, and context. They can serve customers, qualify leads, close sales, schedule meetings, and execute complex tasks — all autonomously via WhatsApp.

items.question: Can I use it with more than one WhatsApp number?
items.answer: Yes. Catalisa supports multi-device and multi-tenant. You can connect multiple WhatsApp numbers, each with its own workflows, agents, and configurations.

items.question: What is Catalisa's 'AI team'?
items.answer: It's a set of specialized AI agents that function as members of your team. Each agent has a defined role (SDR, Support, Finance, etc.), its own tools and autonomy to execute tasks — all coordinated via WhatsApp.

items.question: What tools can my agents use?
items.answer: Agents connect with your existing tools: CRM, ERP, calendar, payments, email and any REST API. They don't replace your tools — they operate them autonomously.

items.question: Do I have control over what the agents do?
items.answer: Yes, full control. You define autonomy limits, human escalation rules, tone of voice and which actions each agent can perform. Everything is monitored in real-time on the operations dashboard.

items.question: What are Catalisa Apps?
items.answer: Apps are complete backends, APIs and portals built with enterprise-grade Building Blocks. Unlike generic low-code tools, each Catalisa app comes with native banking-grade security, approved market providers, audit trail and compliance — all out of the box.

items.question: What's the difference between AI Agents and Apps?
items.answer: AI Agents are the human interface — they serve customers, qualify leads and resolve issues via WhatsApp. Apps are the enterprise infrastructure — backends, APIs and portals that process operations with banking-grade security. Both use the same Building Blocks and run on the same platform.

items.question: Can I build a complete credit system?
items.answer: Yes. With enterprise Building Blocks such as Decision Engine, Bureau Check, E-Signature and Audit Trail, you can build a complete credit origination system — from application to disbursement — in minutes, with native banking-grade security.

items.question: Do I need developers to create Apps?
items.answer: No. AI selects the enterprise Building Blocks, models the architecture and generates APIs automatically. You configure business rules via visual interface. For advanced integrations, we offer API and SDK.

items.question: Do my Apps generate documented APIs?
items.answer: Yes. Every API is generated with automatic OpenAPI documentation, authentication, rate limiting and versioning. Ready for consumption by other systems, mobile apps or partners.

items.question: Can I connect an AI Agent to an App I created?
items.answer: Yes. That's the power of the platform. An AI Agent can collect data via WhatsApp and send it to an App that processes with Decision Engine, generates contracts and logs everything in the audit trail — all on the same platform, with the same Building Blocks.
